violations.text: A couple of doors to the outside are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The sinks used for food preparation are lacking a proper air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The sinks used for food preparation are lacking proper air gaps. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Air gaps are to be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The door to the restrooms are not self-closing. Restroom doors must be self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The facility is lacking a 3-bay sink that is easily accessible to the prep room addition. 3-bay sink is to be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Proper air gap is to be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. Self-closing door must be installed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024

Doors to the outside are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024

Individual cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024
